privileged_info_summary: GCompris is confirmed to be real, open-source, free software (AGPLv3 license) widely available from legitimate sources including GitHub, official website, GNU Project, and F-Droid. However, the task metadata contains three contradicted claims: (1) No activity named 'Measure Angle' exists in the GCompris repository which contains 204 activities; (2) GCompris does not have a 'Mathematics' category - official categories are Computer discovery, Reading, Arithmetic, Science, Geography, Games, and Other; (3) GCompris does not use 'Geometry' as a subcategory. The expected screenshot path is valid and consistent with the task setup scripts.
